children.name: div
children.textContent: Point your camera at the fridge, pantry, or counter

children.name: div
children.textContent: Photo identifies ingredients, estimates freshness & flags what expires soon.

children.name: div
children.textContent: App builds meals around what you have, your time, and available equipment.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Cook once, eat twice — leftovers become tomorrow's lunch automatically.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Include expiry date stickers in your scan — Leftover Lens prioritizes meals around what spoils soonest to cut food waste.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Use the mushrooms tonight or freeze them — they've been in the fridge for 4 days and won't last longer.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Add these 3 items to unlock 5 more meals this week:
